title: Fabulously Nyalamised
description: A personal fork of Fabulously Optimized with my own additions
body:
<!-- Markdown -->
[![Built on Fabulously Optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/built-with/fabulously-optimized_64h.png)](https://github.com/Fabulously-Optimized/fabulously-optimized)

# Fabulously Nyalamised
My variation of [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) with a few mods I personally enjoy as well as including shaderpacks by default <ins>(in versions older than 3.1.1)</ins> and better defaults for controls (who uses shift for crouch????)

This modpack was created as an easy way for me to collect all my mods into a single place to easily download, update and share my mods to my friends or for those who wish to use it

I also recommend using brucethemoose's [guide on java args](https://github.com/brucethemoose/Minecraft-Performance-Flags-Benchmarks#graalvm-enterprise-edition) for graalvm java as I personally use it and believe it complements this modpack

## Credits
1. This modpack contains content __not made by me__, as such all rights are reserved to their rightful owners, creators, and maintainers and I am sincerely glad this content was released for free for everyone to use
2. This modpack is a modification/variation of [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) with changes and additions that I personally enjoy
3. This modpack includes the following resourcepacks <ins>(in versions newer than 2.0.0+1.20.1)</ins> by default:
   - [OLED](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oled-gui)
4. This modpack includes the following shaderpacks <ins>(in versions older than 3.1.1)</ins> by default:
   - [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
   - [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels)
   - [MakeUp - Ultra Fast](https://modrinth.com/shader/makeup-ultra-fast-shaders)
   - [FastPBR](https://modrinth.com/shader/fastpbr)
   - [Voyager shader 2.0](https://modrinth.com/shader/voyager-shader-2.0)

## Disclaimer
In the unlikely case this pack causes any damage to your instance, world or machine (it shouldn't but in the case it does) I am not responsible

Version formatting is as follows (and resets after each minecraft version)

X.Y.Z+(Minecraft version)
- X = New/removed mod changes (Major)
- Y = Config changes/Mod updates (Moderate)
- Z = Other changes (Minor)
